data.name: 蛤蜊島編年史：慾望滋生之地
data.detailed_description:
新手冒險者艾米在一次失敗的任務後踏上歸途，結果半路直接遭遇海難，被迫流落到一座剛被發現的神秘小島上。好在天無絕人之路，島上居然也設有本地的冒險者公會分部。現在，她唯一要做的，就是在下一艘前往王國的船到來之前活下去。

與此同時，艾米也為自己立下了新目標：要把自己從一個初出茅廬的新手，鍛鍊成島上數一數二的冒險者。

蛤蜊島編年史：慾望滋生之地是一款以冒險和與島民互動為核心的RPG遊戲。你可以通過完成任務、賺取金幣、探索並解鎖新的地點，與更強的敵人戰鬥，最終成長為等級最高的冒險者。

儘管艾米是因為遭遇海難才被困在島上，但這完全不妨礙她迅速融入當地生活。她開始學習如何與島上的居民打交道，尤其是那些只在夜晚才會出現的社交場合！原本純真善良的艾米，會在新工作的過程中，一點點接觸到…… 一些她從未想過、卻令人難忘的特殊體驗。

選擇將產生影響

不同的選擇不僅會改變艾米的道德傾向，也會影響遊戲中事件的推進和最終結局。 

冒險

探索島嶼的不同區域，學習新內容，升級並強化艾米的裝備、技能和冒險者等級，一步步提昇實力，朝著她的目標前進。 

資源管理

合理安排艾米的時間和各類資源，當然也包括她的貞潔度。有些選擇確實能更輕鬆地賺到錢，但這些選擇往往伴隨著不可忽視的代價。 

不會GG

在戰鬥中被擊敗後，玩家將返回基地繼續遊戲。無需擔心懲罰或中斷，可以輕鬆享受遊戲過程。 

回憶房間

可以回顧過去已經解鎖的事件內容，同時也提供模擬戰鬥功能，方便玩家進行練習或測試。 

語音演出

所有澀澀場景全程配音。

data.short_description: 在這款RPG裡，你將扮演因海難漂流到蛤蜊島的新手冒險者艾米。透過戰鬥、委託與裝備強化不斷成長，結識島上的居民，並深入探索夜晚的酒館世界。你可以努力登上冒險者的巔峰，也可能在放縱中逐漸失去純真。
data.supported_languages:
英文, 日文*, 簡體中文, 繁體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Chronicles of Clams Island
data.detailed_description:
Newbie adventurer Amy returns home from a failed quest, only to be shipwrecked and stranded on a recently discovered island. Luckily, the island also has a local guild branch. Now all she needs to do is survive until the next ship sails toward the Kingdom.

In the meantime, she sets her goal on transforming from a newbie adventurer into one of the island’s best!

Chronicles of Clams Island is an RPG focused on adventuring and interacting with the locals. Complete quests, earn money, and find new locations to unlock and battle more enemies, eventually rising to become the highest-ranked adventurer.

Although Amy was shipwrecked on the island, that doesn’t stop her from learning to mingle with the islanders. Time to get acquainted with the nightlife! Amy starts off pure and virtuous, but little by little, she’ll discover that her new job comes with its own… interesting lessons.

Choices Matter

Different choices will impact Amy's morality as well as the game's events and endings.

Adventure

Discover different areas of the island, learn, upgrade, and improve Amy's

gear, skills, and adventurer rank to reach her goal!

Resource Management

Manage Amy's time, resources, as well as chastity. Some choices will allow an easier way to earn money, but there's always a cost.

No Game Overs

When defeated in battle, you will return to your base. Enjoy the game without any stress.

Recollection Room

Don't miss out on the past events. There's also an option to do mock battles!

Voice Acting

All erotic scenes are fully voiced.

data.short_description: In this RPG, play as Amy, a shipwrecked rookie stranded on Clams Island. Battle monsters, complete quests, upgrade your gear, meet locals, and explore the nightlife, where even more adventures await. Rise to become a top-ranked adventurer, or lose your purity trying!
data.supported_languages:
English, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
